renal cyst.base_explanation: A renal cyst is a fluid-filled sac within the kidney. Simple cysts are common and usually benign.
renal cyst.follow_up_note: Further evaluation depends on size, appearance, and symptoms.

multiple renal cysts.base_explanation: This finding indicates more than one cyst is present in the kidneys.
multiple renal cysts.follow_up_note: Doctors assess whether this is an age-related change or part of a broader condition.

hydronephrosis.base_explanation: Hydronephrosis refers to dilation of the kidney due to buildup of urine.
hydronephrosis.follow_up_note: Further evaluation helps determine whether there is an obstruction.

renal calculi.base_explanation: Renal calculi are stones within the kidney. Some stones may not cause symptoms.
renal calculi.follow_up_note: Stone size and symptoms guide management decisions.

ureteric calculus.base_explanation: A ureteric calculus is a stone located in the tube that carries urine from the kidney to the bladder.
ureteric calculus.follow_up_note: Symptoms and imaging findings help guide further care.

pelvicalyceal dilatation.base_explanation: This means the urine-collecting areas of the kidney appear mildly enlarged.
pelvicalyceal dilatation.follow_up_note: Doctors correlate this with symptoms and other imaging findings.

renal scarring.base_explanation: Renal scarring indicates areas of the kidney that have healed after past injury or infection.

cortical thinning.base_explanation: Cortical thinning means the outer layer of the kidney appears thinner than usual.
cortical thinning.follow_up_note: This finding is interpreted alongside kidney function tests.

bladder wall thickening.base_explanation: This means the bladder wall appears thicker than normal on imaging.
bladder wall thickening.follow_up_note: Symptoms and urine tests help determine the cause.

no renal abnormality detected.base_explanation: This means no significant abnormalities were identified in the kidneys on imaging.
no renal abnormality detected.follow_up_note: This is generally a reassuring finding.
